news.title: 2025-2026 Tryout Dates Announced
news.summary: Official tryouts will begin on September 27, 2025. Register online via our Tryout Manager at MIDVBC.com.

news.title: Pray for Janae
news.summary: Janae Edmondson, a talented setter for Mid TN VBC, was seriously injured in a car accident in St. Louis. The volleyball community has come together to support her recovery. #prayfornae

programs.name: Elite/Travel
programs.description: High-level competitive teams traveling to national qualifiers.

programs.name: Regional
programs.description: Competitive teams playing within the SRVA region.

programs.name: Developmental/Training
programs.description: Focus on skill building for younger or newer players.

usa_volleyball.expert_note: USA Volleyball 2025-2027 rule highlights: Multiple contacts on the second hit are permitted if play continues without advantage. Serving tossing errors now result in a re-serve. Center line encroachment is permitted if it doesn't interfere or create safety hazards. Numbers must be centered on the upper half of uniform tops (by 2029).

srva.expert_note: SRVA 2025-2026: Membership is mandatory for all participants. Tryout memberships are available. Teams must honor officiating commitments after play is completed. SafeSport compliance is strictly enforced.

faq.question: Where do I sign in for tryouts?
faq.answer: You can sign in at the Check-In station at the facility (Hooptown) or use our online Tryout Manager.

faq.question: What do I need to be ready for?
faq.answer: Arrive 30 minutes early, bring your water bottle, and ensure all SRVA paperwork is completed.

faq.question: What is the cost?
faq.answer: Tryout fees are typically around $65, but please confirm the exact amount on our registration page.

social_updates.instagram: Recent post: Good luck to our teams competing this weekend! #midtnvbc @Midtvbc
social_updates.facebook: Recent post: Reminder to complete your SRVA membership before tryouts.

usa_volleyball_latest: Update: 2025-2027 Rulebook published. Multiple contacts on 2nd hit allowed if no advantage.
